arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Wolfsburg preview: Rose under growing pressure
arts.sum: Two teams coming off disappointing draws face each other in the DFB-Pokal on Wednesday when Leipzig host Wolfsburg. Here's our preview of the game, including the predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Pressure mounts on Rose as Leipzig's problems continue
arts.sum: The pressure is mounting on Marco Rose after another disappointing result for RB Leipzig in the Bundesliga at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Liam Delap, Castello Lukeba, Frenkie de Jong
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.
